us_traction.description: US AI marketing agencies gaining significant traction — what they're doing and why it's working

entries.name: Blaze AI
entries.what_theyre_doing_well: Positioned as 'AI That Does Marketing For You,' Blaze automates content across blog, social, email, and ads — trusted by 15K+ startups, agencies, and Fortune 500 teams. Low friction onboarding pulls in SMBs and solo operators fast.
entries.why_getting_traction: Crystal-clear value prop with brand voice training, multi-channel output, and low monthly pricing. Strong word-of-mouth in solopreneur and agency communities where the 'replace your marketing VA with AI' pitch lands hard.
entries.inspiration_notes: Doble AI should steal the 'AI That Does Marketing For You' framing — position the whole agency around removing the owner from the marketing loop entirely. The deliverable is time-back and peace of mind, not just content.

entries.name: C2 Agency
entries.what_theyre_doing_well: Laser-focused on local service businesses — HVAC, restaurants, contractors — automating social media posts, blog content, email campaigns, and lead capture with AI. The offer is nearly identical to Doble AI's model, executed nationally.
entries.why_getting_traction: Named vertical targeting (HVAC, restaurants) makes the pitch land fast — local owners see themselves in the copy immediately. AI-powered + local SMB is a potent, underserved combination at the execution layer.
entries.inspiration_notes: Doble AI should build dedicated vertical pages now — 'AI Marketing for Eagle County Contractors', 'AI Social Media for Vail Restaurants' — same playbook C2 uses to own local-intent searches before a national player colonizes the geography.

entries.name: SOCi
entries.what_theyre_doing_well: SOCi's 'Genius Social Agent' automatically builds social content calendars, responds to reviews, and manages local listings — a full AI co-pilot for local marketing at scale across hundreds of locations simultaneously.
entries.why_getting_traction: Multi-location franchise brands desperately need consistent local presence at scale and SOCi owns that niche. Strong enterprise sales motion backed by hard ROI data and deep integrations.
entries.inspiration_notes: Borrow SOCi's 'always-on local presence' framing for Eagle County SMBs — sell the idea that a business never goes dark: automated posting, review responses, and Google listing updates running 24/7 with no owner effort.

entries.name: Hibu
entries.what_theyre_doing_well: All-in-one AI-enabled platform serving 70,000+ local businesses: websites, SEO, SEM, social, reviews, and CRM in a single bundle. Won Microsoft Advertising's 2024 Channel Partner of the Year. Revenue ~$5B.
entries.why_getting_traction: Done-for-you bundled model wins decisively with local owners who don't want multiple vendors. AI layer on a proven local marketing playbook creates strong retention and cross-sell.
entries.inspiration_notes: Hibu proves the all-in-one bundle wins for SMBs. Doble AI's counter-position: Hibu is impersonal and massive. Lean into being the high-touch, locally-embedded neighbor who also runs AI — that authenticity is a story Hibu can never tell.

entries.name: Embarque
entries.what_theyre_doing_well: Revenue-driven AI SEO agency now leading with GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) — getting clients cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI search results. Documented wins: 178% blog traffic growth, 6x organic in 6 months.
entries.why_getting_traction: First-mover on GEO/AIO — optimizing for AI search is the new SEO gold rush and Embarque is building authority fast. Attracts clients panicking about Google traffic being eaten by AI.
entries.inspiration_notes: Doble AI should add 'AI search visibility' to its local SEO pitch — help Eagle County businesses get cited when locals ask ChatGPT 'best landscaper in Avon CO.' This is a defensible edge; traditional local agencies don't even know GEO exists yet.

entries.name: inBeat Agency
entries.what_theyre_doing_well: Pioneering AI-driven creative intelligence paired with micro-influencer marketing — uses AI to predict which creative content will perform before spending budget. Prolific content marketing machine drives massive organic reach and keeps them in every industry roundup.
entries.why_getting_traction: Micro-influencer + AI creative is a novel, high-ROI combo that outperforms traditional social spend. Their content engine constantly feeds the SEO flywheel, compounding authority month over month.
entries.inspiration_notes: Doble AI could pilot a local micro-influencer program in Eagle County — connecting restaurants and retailers with Vail/Beaver Creek lifestyle accounts. AI helps analyze performance. Small community, big flywheel potential.
